input.background: A randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled trial examined the effects of calcium supplementation on blood pressure in normotensive men 19 to 52 years of age. After establishing baseline blood pressures, subjects were assigned to either a treatment or control group. The treatment group was supplemented with 1500 milligrams of calcium per day for a 12-week period. The control group received an identical-appearing placebo. Table 12.3 lists systolic blood pressure measurements taken in the seated position for the African American men who took part in the study.
input.data:
\begin{table}
\captionsetup{labelformat=empty}
\caption{Table 12.3 Effect of calcium supplementation on blood pressure.}
\begin{tabular}{|l|l|l|l|l|}
\hline \multicolumn{5}{|c|}{GROUP} \
\hline SUBJECT ID No. & 1 = treatment 2 = placebo & BEFORE mm Hg & AFTER mm Hg & DELTA mm Hg \
\hline 1 & 1 & 107 & 100 & 7 \
\hline 2 & 1 & 110 & 114 & -4 \
\hline 3 & 1 & 123 & 105 & 18 \
\hline 4 & 1 & 129 & 112 & 17 \
\hline 5 & 1 & 112 & 115 & -3 \
\hline 6 & 1 & 111 & 116 & -5 \
\hline 7 & 1 & 107 & 106 & 1 \
\hline 8 & 1 & 112 & 102 & 10 \
\hline 9 & 1 & 136 & 125 & 11 \
\hline 10 & 1 & 102 & 104 & -2 \
\hline 11 & 2 & 123 & 124 & -1 \
\hline 12 & 2 & 109 & 97 & 12 \
\hline 13 & 2 & 112 & 113 & -1 \
\hline 14 & 2 & 102 & 105 & -3 \
\hline 15 & 2 & 98 & 95 & 3 \
\hline 16 & 2 & 114 & 119 & -5 \
\hline 17 & 2 & 119 & 114 & 5 \
\hline 18 & 2 & 114 & 112 & 2 \
\hline 19 & 2 & 110 & 121 & -11 \
\hline 20 & 2 & 117 & 118 & -1 \
\hline 21 & 2 & 130 & 133 & -3 \
\hline
\end{tabular}
\end{table}
input.question: The placebo group consists of n2=11. Here are the declines in blood pressure (mmHg) for this group: -1, 12, -1, -3, 3, -5, 5, 2, -11, -1, -3. The average of these 12 values is -0.27 (standard deviation 5.901).

output.answer: These two samples are independent, as is the comparison of their means (5.00 mgHg vs. -0.27 mmHg).

Subject_ID.description: Unique identifier for each subject in the study.

Group.description: Indicates whether the subject is in the treatment group (1) or the placebo group (2).

Before_BP.description: Systolic blood pressure measured before the intervention.

After_BP.description: Systolic blood pressure measured after the intervention.

Delta_BP.description: Change in systolic blood pressure (After_BP - Before_BP).

Placebo_BP_Decline.description: Declines in blood pressure for the placebo group.

Placebo_Average_Decline.description: Average decline in blood pressure for the placebo group.

Placebo_Standard_Deviation.description: Standard deviation of the blood pressure declines in the placebo group.

meta_info.caption: Paired and independent samples (Effect of calcium supplementation on blood pressure).
